languages.text: Шаттлы опустились на крошечном клочке ровной поверхности, чудом уцелевшем после бомбардировок. Вокруг высились исполинские руины ксеносских строений, сокрушенных натиском орбитальных орудий флагмана. Где-то внизу, под толщей оплавленного металла, таилась единственная обитель Тразина в Просторе Коронус — его Музеон.

traits.locale_text: Шаттлы приземлились где-то в нагромождении зловещих металлических строений, назвать которые "архитектурой" не поворачивался язык. Циклопические сооружения терялись где-то в бесконечной выси, скрывая под собой святая святых Тразина — его Музеон.

languages.text: The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of clear ground that had miraculously escaped the shelling. Around them towered the colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere beneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.
languages.original_text: Шаттлы опустились на крошечном клочке ровной поверхности, чудом уцелевшем после бомбардировок. Вокруг высились исполинские руины ксеносских строений, сокрушенных натиском орбитальных орудий флагмана. Где-то внизу, под толщей оплавленного металла, таилась единственная обитель Тразина в Просторе Коронус — его Музеон.

traits.locale_text: The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of smooth surface that had miraculously survived the shelling. Towering around were colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere underneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.

The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of clear ground that had miraculously escaped the shelling. Around them towered the colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere beneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.
The shuttles descended amidst the ominous metal edifices that concealed Trazyn's sanctum sanctorum — his Museion.

The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of smooth surface that had miraculously survived the shelling. Towering around were colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere underneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.

The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of clear ground that had miraculously escaped the shelling. Around them towered the colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere beneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.

languages.text: 穿梭机降落在一片奇迹般未被轰击波及的空地，四周高耸着异形建筑的巨大废墟——它们已被旗舰无情的轨道炮轰得粉碎。在厚厚的熔融金属层下，隐藏着特拉金在科罗努斯扩区的唯一居所——他的大陈列馆。
languages.original_text: The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of clear ground that had miraculously escaped the shelling. Around them towered the colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere beneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.

traits.locale_text: 穿梭机降落在一片奇迹般未被轰击波及的空地，四周高耸着异形建筑的巨大废墟——它们已被旗舰无情的轨道炮轰得粉碎。在厚厚的熔融金属层下，隐藏着特拉金在科罗努斯扩区的唯一居所——他的大陈列馆。

languages.text: Las lanzaderas aterrizaron en un pequeño claro que había escapado milagrosamente al bombardeo. A su alrededor se erguían las colosales ruinas de estructuras xenos pulverizadas por los implacables cañones orbitales de la nave insignia. Oculto bajo una densa capa de metal fundido se hallaba el único escondite de Trazyn en la Extensión de Koronus: su Museion.
languages.original_text: The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of clear ground that had miraculously escaped the shelling. Around them towered the colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere beneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.

traits.locale_text: Las lanzaderas aterrizaron en un pequeño claro que había escapado milagrosamente al bombardeo. A su alrededor se erguían las colosales ruinas de estructuras xenos pulverizadas por los implacables cañones orbitales de la nave insignia. Oculto bajo una densa capa de metal fundido se hallaba el único escondite de Trazyn en la Extensión de Koronus: su Museion.

languages.text: Les navettes se posèrent sur une minuscule parcelle de terrain qui avait miraculeusement échappé aux bombardements. Tout autour s'élevaient les ruines colossales d'édifices xénos, réduits en poussière par les salves des canons orbitaux du vaisseau amiral. Cachée quelque part sous une épaisse couche de métal en fusion se trouvait la seule demeure de Trazyn dans les Étendues de Koronus : son Muséion.
languages.original_text: The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of clear ground that had miraculously escaped the shelling. Around them towered the colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere beneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.

traits.locale_text: Les navettes se posèrent sur une minuscule parcelle de terrain qui avait miraculeusement échappé aux bombardements. Tout autour s'élevaient les ruines colossales d'édifices xénos, réduits en poussière par les salves des canons orbitaux du vaisseau amiral. Cachée quelque part sous une épaisse couche de métal en fusion se trouvait la seule demeure de Trazyn dans les Étendues de Koronus : son Muséion.

languages.text: Mekikler, mucizevi bir şekilde bombardımandan kurtulmuş küçük, temiz bir toprak parçasına indi. Etraflarında, sancak gemisinin amansız yörünge toplarınca toz hâline getirilmiş devasa zeno yapılarının kalıntıları yükseliyordu. Kalın bir erimiş metal tabakasının altında bir yerde gizlenmiş olan Trazyn'in Koronus Enginliği'ndeki tek meskeni vardı... Museion'u.
languages.original_text: The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of clear ground that had miraculously escaped the shelling. Around them towered the colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere beneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.

traits.locale_text: Mekikler, mucizevi bir şekilde bombardımandan kurtulmuş küçük, temiz bir toprak parçasına indi. Etraflarında, sancak gemisinin amansız yörünge toplarınca toz hâline getirilmiş devasa zeno yapılarının kalıntıları yükseliyordu. Kalın bir erimiş metal tabakasının altında bir yerde gizlenmiş olan Trazyn'in Koronus Enginliği'ndeki tek meskeni vardı... Museion'u.

languages.text: Die Shuttles landete auf einem winzigen Stück Land, das dem Bombardement wie durch ein Wunder entgangen war. Um sie herum ragten die kolossalen Ruinen der von den Orbitalkanonen des Flaggschiffs pulverisierten Xenosstrukturen gen Himmel. Verborgen unter einer dicken Schicht aus geschmolzenem Metall befand sich Trazyns einzige Bleibe in der Koronus-Ausdehnung ... sein Museion.
languages.original_text: The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of clear ground that had miraculously escaped the shelling. Around them towered the colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere beneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.

traits.locale_text: Die Shuttles landete auf einem winzigen Stück Land, das dem Bombardement wie durch ein Wunder entgangen war. Um sie herum ragten die kolossalen Ruinen der von den Orbitalkanonen des Flaggschiffs pulverisierten Xenosstrukturen gen Himmel. Verborgen unter einer dicken Schicht aus geschmolzenem Metall befand sich Trazyns einzige Bleibe in der Koronus-Ausdehnung ... sein Museion.

languages.text: シャトルは、トラズンの聖なる場所である「ミュゼイオン」を隠す不吉な金属建造物の中を下降した。
languages.original_text: The shuttles descended amidst the ominous metal edifices that concealed Trazyn's sanctum sanctorum — his Museion.

traits.locale_text: シャトルは、トラズンの聖なる場所である「ミュゼイオン」を隠す不吉な金属建造物の中を下降した。
